use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use asysocks-brute because Socks5 / Socks4 client and server library (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use asysocks-brute as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `asysocks-brute [options] [args]` as documented upstream for asysocks-brute.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair asysocks-brute with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `asysocks-brute --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
